name: Ordo
description: The Power: Ordo is the lattice of the universe, the force of Stasis and Structure that opposes entropy.

structural_defense.name: Defense
structural_defense.effect: Turns skin as hard as diamond or creates barriers of force

utility.name: Utility
effects: Preserves food or dead bodies indefinitely
Locks doors so they physically cannot open
Creates permanent structures like bridges and shelters that ignore decay
